notes: Chunk 36 complete 2026-06-07. Template A (Field Manual), Tier B, 25 routes. Corridors: 8 inbound to Greece (india, south-korea, indonesia, malaysia, thailand, brazil, mexico, japan), 5 inbound to Denmark (india, south-korea, malaysia, brazil, mexico), 4 EU-to-Brazil (greece, netherlands, italy, portugal), 2 Thailand outbound (thailand-to-italy, thailand-to-portugal), 3 EU-to-Indonesia (greece, italy, netherlands), 2 EU-to-Malaysia (greece, netherlands), 1 EU-to-Mexico (greece-to-mexico). Key regulatory: Japan is EU-listed (no titre test for EU entry); Brazil no quarantine/no import permit (web-verified against data file); Denmark no tapeworm treatment; Malaysia 3-month wait + 14-day quarantine (Dec 2024 DVS update); Indonesia 30-day quarantine + BARANTAN iQFast; KLM direct AMS-CGK and AMS-KUL noted. Routes 5431 -> 5456, pages 6220 -> 6245. Next chunk 37 (Template B, Tier B). Blog Day 10 next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
